ogTitle: Nene Valley vs Nepabunna: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Nene Valley and Nepabunna.
heading: Nene Valley vs Nepabunna — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Nene Valley, South Australia and Nepabunna, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Nepabunna has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Nene Valley (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Nene Valley or Nepabunna safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Nene Valley has a flood risk score of 47/100, while Nepabunna scores 57/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Nene Valley scores 65/100 for bushfire risk. Nepabunna scores 35/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Nene Valley or Nepabunna?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Nepabunna has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.35% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
